textByHashes.cafa29230a4c85fbc10a2316017110b895d0414f: Er... yes... quite right. Did you need something?
textByHashes.1b589435b4e0c6a0f9fcc1182d9f05eefedc4303: Not right now. Things are all very boring at the moment. What I'd give to be over at the bar having a nice Khali brew...
textByHashes.7a9d2f9cac2758ffdcc401a5235a55caf60e452c: Oh, nothing beats them! Mind you, don't make the mistake of having too many. Last time I did, I ended up falling straight to sleep.
textByHashes.c24e3159739c840c2e2b0a59f59215444ed22fad: What a boring day. You'd think the slaves would be more entertaining.
textByHashes.5155341b6baad87b1131b8f2e87435d20220781f: Too right! Then it's straight to the bar for a nice Khali brew.
textByHashes.e395a8aacc4b502e989b05428cf90cfa7f7ab778: This area is restricted. Leave now!
textByHashes.a6deb57e90da3c1e27b4d0527ad82058442300bc: Oh... okay then, but just the one.
textByHashes.ce6e49f184e95e3e671d2c46709c603a9c7ea6b8: That is some gooood stuff... yeah... wooh, yeah!
textByHashes.28f20f3ff5f28b3642a9e04f3191b2bd1d08dc8f: Yeesshh! Oooh, maybe I sshould relax for a while.
textByHashes.9d5e78f4230cca1626fefeda63c2bc6a5a3b36ce: Yeesh... that shounds reasonable. Here, take the keysch. Any trouble, you give... you give 'em a good beating.
textByHashes.b2b7e447739556f1ad05ebc28f4deff09835f1c3: Pleash... leave me alone. Did the walls always shway soooo much?
textByHashes.fbacde0173cb98c8488c5970b78ee1caa9716636: What? You're foolish... and I'm all drunk. Here... takes my shpare shh... set!
textByHashes.b389ce3b73c911a6ab1e4185408d8f6f48dac6b4: Thish areash resh... restricted! We don't like strangersh... 'specially ones who sway. Oooh!
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHashes.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
